title: Selected target role (cold prospect)
description: The target-role angle the user picked (or supplied) for the cold application. Consumed by CV tailoring, motivation letter, LinkedIn outreach, and the dossier.

title.description: Role title to anchor downstream tailoring. For the generalist path, a synthetic title like 'Senior .NET — Desktop & Services, open to scope'.

source.description: How this role was selected. candidate_pick = one of the LLM proposals; generalist = 'open to discussion' path; user_override = free-form title supplied by the user when no proposal fit.

candidate_index.description: Zero-based index into role_candidates.candidates[] when source='candidate_pick'. Null otherwise.

emphasis_areas.description: Carried over from the picked candidate, or user-supplied for overrides. Empty array is acceptable for the generalist path.

rationale.description: Why this angle — carried over from the candidate, or the user's reason for the override/generalist pick.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the selection was persisted.
